untranslatable_reason: This signal requires universe filtering (1,000 largest by market cap), ranking by absolute price (10 lowest-priced), and portfolio-level equal-weighting logic. These are not point-in-time indicator conditions expressible with the allowed indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume, Position, Z-score, Returns, Bar Props). The signal is a portfolio construction and rebalancing rule rather than a tradeable entry/exit signal based on technical indicators.
translation_notes: Signal CHAN_QT_DRY_0 is a value/contrarian stock-picking strategy based on fundamental ranking (market cap) and absolute price level, not technical analysis. It requires: (1) cross-sectional filtering by market cap rank, (2) ranking by price absolute value (not relative to any moving average or threshold), and (3) portfolio-level allocation logic. Standard backtesting engines using point-in-time technical indicators cannot natively express this without custom data handlers for market-cap ranking and cross-sectional selection. Recommend implementing as a separate portfolio construction module.
